game_use: Region 1 set dressing near the ProductionCombatSlice exploration route
mvp_scope: environment prop only; no new gameplay system

known_warnings: Fallback ASCII FBX has no UV0; replace with Blender/provider export before final art lock.
Tiny fallback mesh skipped the LOD reduction gate.
Unity preview import may collapse named fallback LOD nodes into one preview LOD.
Unity preview prefab can rebuild renderers from imported Mesh subassets when the fallback FBX has no renderer hierarchy.
